title: Section 62
content: Nothing in this Act shall be deemed to require any instrument, to which the Government or any officer of the Government in his official capacity is a party, to be executed before a Village-registrar2 [* * *]
footnote: 1. The words "or any Society registered under the Co-operative Credit Societies Act, 1904" inserted by Bom. Act 1 of 1910 were repealed by Bom. Act 1 of 1912.
